Young Red Dragon can't reach Vedalken — Bardic Musician with Bite (distance 30ft, range 10ft).
--- Vedalken — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 5 falling damage. HP: 173/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.
--- Vedalken — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 16] FAIL! 2 psychic damage. HP: 171/178
=== ROUND 3 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
--- Vedalken — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Vedalken — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 25 damage. Vedalken — Bardic Musician HP: 42/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Vedalken — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 24 damage. Vedalken — Bardic Musician HP: 18/67
→ Vedalken — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 11 vs DC 12]
Young Red Dragon attacks Vedalken — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Vedalken — Bardic Musician HP: 4/67
--- Vedalken — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Vedalken — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Vedalken — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Vedalken — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
→ Vedalken — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 8 vs DC 10]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
